meta.purpose: Small-batch official-source addendum for PL Commentary Bank before any database promotion.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Confirmed histories require explicit official/high-trust source support with athlete identity kept unambiguous. Ambiguous identity, incomplete context, and same-name rows without enough current-roster linkage stay outside data/database.json. Do not infer achievements from name similarity.

batchScope.reasonForAudit: A prior Lot 76-80 batch (#89) captured 2026 Spring Ebetsu findings but did not cover the HPA 2024 annual result PDF. This addendum checks only the official 2024 HPA PDF rows for a small non-overlapping historical-source pass.
batchScope.openPrCheck: Open PR check before this run found only #111, a non-overlapping completion report generator that does not mutate data/database.json, data/research-candidates.json, or A4 print layout.
batchScope.writeScope: Research batch log only. No data/database.json, data/research-candidates.json, app runtime, CSS, generator logic, print template, A4 layout, or v5.9.6_LOCK changes.

sourceIndex.title: HPA 2024 annual official result PDF
sourceIndex.rowLevelExtractionStatus: Opened and text-searched in this run. Exact rows for 土屋 仁 and 佐藤 楓 were located. 伊畑 一真, 山下 幹太, and 中嶋 輝 checks were also used to avoid accidental spillover from adjacent Lot 76-85 work.

sourceIndex.title: GitHub open PR check
sourceIndex.auditFinding: Only open PR found: #111 Add Numata completion report generator. Non-overlapping with athlete data mutation and A4 layout.

candidateFindings.competitionName: 第2回北海道・東北ブロックベンチプレス選手権大会
candidateFindings.candidateReason: Official HPA row is confirmed, but Lot79 current roster has only name/kana and no birth year, team, class, or current-event row extracted in database.json. Keep as candidate until same-person identity is confirmed.

athletes.auditNotes: No database promotion. This row is valuable for narration only after current-event identity linkage is confirmed; do not present as confirmed history yet.

candidateFindings.competitionName: 第29回北海道パワーリフティング選手権大会
candidateFindings.candidateReason: Exact official row and prior #89 confirmed 2026 same-name HPA row strongly suggest continuity, but this automation run did not rewrite data/database.json or perform a full identity-promotion pass. Kept as candidate/batch-log addendum until conservative promotion.

candidateFindings.competitionName: 第2回北海道・東北ブロックベンチプレス選手権大会
candidateFindings.candidateReason: Exact official row and same affiliation as the 2024 CLPL row. Kept outside data/database.json in this addendum-only run pending a dedicated promotion pass with sourceIds.

athletes.auditNotes: No duplicate confirmed row was added. Prior Lot 76-80 batch already captured 2026 Spring Ebetsu CLPL for 佐藤 楓; this file adds only 2024 official-source context as candidate/batch-log data.

notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.reason: This was a narrow official-source addendum and did not perform a minified data/database.json rewrite. Candidate rows remain isolated from confirmed database histories.
notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.safeNextStep: Run a dedicated conservative promotion pass for Lot 79 and Lot 80 only after confirming current-event identity fields and source ID conventions, or continue adjacent official-PDF addendum checks without touching A4 layout.
